economic_interpretation: Weak positive mirror of the hawkish effect; never significant. The hawkish/dovish asymmetry itself is the finding (tail-risk-hedge reading), consistent across LP and DML.

Anchor finding, confirmed by LP, DML, and SVAR and sign-stable across eras: hawkish policy surprises depress all metals (Au -1.4% at h=5), hardest in rate-hike-expectation regimes; magnitude has decayed since the QE era; palladium unstable post-2020.
Event study null (small unstable positives); the SVAR's pure USD shock is canonically negative for gold. Direction-consistent across subsamples but never significant.
Null/fragile: LP null, DML borderline-negative, SVAR risk-aversion shock positive. The GPR index measures news intensity, not flight-to-safety; the safe-haven channel shows up only in the SVAR.

The event definition is contaminated: gold is textbook-positive in 2020-26 while the apparent inversion concentrates in PGMs (COVID-era liquidation/industrial episodes). USD-gold channel fine per the SVAR.
